characters.name: Blair
characters.description: Blairis one of the employees at thesalon. Blair is the receptionist at Sunny's salon. She is in charge of scheduling and keeping track of every appointment from her desk in the salon's entryway. She always carries a tablet computer that records the salon's daily schedule. When there are no customers at her desk, she sometimes gives honorary manicures to customers waiting for their haircuts. Blair is very cheerful and energetic. She tends not to get tired since, unlike Sunny and Rox, she doesn't actually have to colour or style customers' hair. Blair is very data- and schedule-oriented. She is skilled at using her tablet to do all kinds of things quickly. Blair is very cheerful and energetic. She tends not to get tired since, unlike Sunny and Rox, she doesn't actually have to colour or style customers' hair. Blair is very data- and schedule-oriented. She is skilled at using her tablet to do all kinds of things quickly.

characters.name: Charlotte
characters.description: Charlotte is a minor character. She is being an audience member of Friendly Falls. She is a good African-American girl. She is being an audience member of Friendly Falls.
characters.personality_section: She is being an audience member of Friendly Falls.

characters.name: Cindy
characters.description: Cindyis one of the main characters. She is a baker with a constant bad hair day. She tends to be unlucky but is very friendly nonetheless. Cindy is voiced by Melissa van der Schyff. Cindy runs her own bakery that the Sunny Day team visits every day. In most episodes, she sells a food item that relates to the episode's main plot. She is prone to bad luck; no matter how many times Cindy goes to Sunny's salon, her hair is always a mess, and often times the food she is selling will be destroyed somehow. However, she is very nice to her customers. Unlike the other characters, Cindy doesn't dye her hair or wear bright colours. She has a cat named Ralph. Cindy has a habit of putting her hands in her pockets while she talks. Cupcakes seem to be her motif since her baker's uniform and storefront are themed around them.

characters.name: Dame Tralada
characters.description: Dame Traladais a recurring character. Dame Tralada is a famous opera singer. She has a powerful voice, as anyone standing next to her when she sings at opera volume is deafened by how loud her song is. She always uses Very Merry Berry shampoo on her hair before big performances, as it boosts her confidence. She actually refuses to go and perform unless her hair has been scented with this hair product.

characters.name: Doodle
characters.description: DoodleWoofSpecies:Labradoodle dogGender:MaleHair Color:Blonde with Purple and RedEye Color:GreenRelationshipsRelatives:Sunny(owner)Friends:Violet,RosieProduction DetailsVoiceQuinn Breslin (pilot)Rob MorrisonChris Garner (UK dub) Doodleis one of the main characters. He is voiced by Rob Morrison. Doodle is Sunny's pet dog and sidekick. He sleeps in a dog bed to the right of Sunny's hairdressing station. While not common, there are other talking dogs in the town besides Doodle. The episode "Friendship Day" reveals that his full name isDoodle-licious Furboy Bark-Bark Waggytail. Doodle is positive, hyperactive, and oblivious to some of the things happening around him. He tends to jump to conclusions. He is very talkative and usually gives Sunny some words of approval after she's finished a hairdressing job.

characters.name: Fee-B
characters.description: Fee-Bis a character. Fee-B is a famous singer. She arrived in Friendly Falls looking for someone to sing an duet with in her latest show. Fee-B normally has dark brown wavy hair, dark bown skin and hazel eyes, but often has it dyed various colors for a performance.She prefers to wear brightly coloured clothing.

characters.name: Felix
characters.description: Felixis a character. Felix is a famous stuntperson. She visits Friendly Falls to perform her latest stunt show and get a special pair of high jumping boots. Her name is possibly an abbreviation of Felicia.

characters.name: Hannah
characters.description: Hannahis a recurring character. Hannahis a ballerina who tries to teach Sunny some ballet inSunny's Birthday Wish List.She appears to be the lead ballerina in her company. She has two pet dogs, Tutu and an unnamed Maltese puppy.

characters.name: Johnny-Ray
characters.description: Johnny-Rayis a recurring character. Johnny-Ray is Friendly Falls resident country musician and rickshaw driver. He plays guitar and sings. He dresses in the traditional country style, cowboy hat, sturdy boots, jeans, loose shirt and a simple plated buckle belt.Johnny-Ray isn't interested in accessorising or dressing up, he's much more comfortable with simple and practical.

characters.name: Junior
characters.description: Junioris a recurring character. Junior isRox's younger brother. He has a hobby of practicing stage magic tricks and is quite talented at this. He is most likely named after their father, hence being referred to as Junior. Junior has brown skin, dark brown eyes and brown cropped hair with a thick black patch on the top of his head that has wavy dark blue lines interspaced throughout it. He wears a red t-shirt, a white long-sleeved shirt underneath the red t-shirt, dark purple baggy jeans with lighter purple stripes on it and black shoes.

characters.name: KC
characters.description: KCSpecies:Poodle dogGender:FemaleHair Color:Pale pinkEye Color:Light violetRelationshipsRelatives:Lacey(owner)Friends:Doodle, Sunny, Rosie, Violet, Lacey, Timmy.Production DetailsVoiceKeke Palmer (pilot) KC is Lacey's pet poodle. She is a talking dog. Her favorite cupcake flavour is Strawberry Swirl. She's usually relegated to assistant in Lacey's madcap schemes and often has to do all the work as a result. KC is generally overcompetive and keeps encouraging Lacey to win. However, she has a cautious streak and will try to hold Lacey in check if her schemes become too outrageous. She's also quite clever, but rarely gets credit for her ideas. KC is generally overcompetive and keeps encouraging Lacey to win. However, she has a cautious streak and will try to hold Lacey in check if her schemes become too outrageous. She's also quite clever, but rarely gets credit for her ideas.

characters.name: Lacey
characters.description: Laceyis one of the antagonists (later main character) ofSunny Day. She is voiced bySarah Stiles. Lacey is a selfish pageant queen who is obsessed with winning the contests thatTimmyhosts. Because of this, she isSunny's rival. She usually cheats in order to win awards, but Timmy always favours Sunny. Lacey has a talking poodle sidekick namedKC. Lacey refers toCindyas her little sister, indicating that she is the eldest sister. She is good evil girl.
characters.personality_section: She is good evil girl.

characters.name: Lulu
characters.description: Luluis a recurring character. Lulu isRoxandJunior's cousin. She is their only cousin, there are no others in their family. In her second appearance, she wants to become a Woodland Fairy like Rox, but has great difficulty mastering the outdoor survival skills necessary to pass the tests. Lulu is friendly, but emotionally sensitive. She's also quite clumsy and inexperienced. Lulu is friendly, but emotionally sensitive. She's also quite clumsy and inexperienced.

characters.name: Prince Dudley
characters.description: Prince Dudleyis a recurring character. He is voiced byJoshua Colley. Prince Dudley is Annabella and Domica's cousin. In his first appearance, he was overconfident and arrogant, believing as a Prince, he didn't need anyone's help, until Sunny convinced him that it's okay to accept assistance from others. According to his cousins, he'd been this way for a while and they referred to several difficulties relating to this attitude of never wanting help or advice. He's still a bit overconfident, as he overestimates his own artistry skills, but soon learns he's not very good at painting.

characters.name: Ralph
characters.description: RalphSpecies:Tabby CatGender:MaleHair Color:OrangeEye Color:GreenRelationshipsRelatives:UnknownFriends:CindyProduction DetailsVoiceUnknown Ralph isCindy's pet kitten. Although he has never talked, Cindy once claimed he gave her an idea for fish and blueberry muffins, which weren't appreciated by the human customers of the Bakery, butDoodleenjoyed them very much. He does appear to understand spoken commands and questions very well though. Ralph is friendly and playful. He often goes to work with Cindy at her bakery. Ralph is friendly and playful. She instanly became friends with her. Rhiannon is friendly and Nice but she can sometimes squeal in excitement. Rhiannon is friendly and Nice but she can sometimes squeal in excitement.

characters.name: Rox
characters.description: Roxis one of the main characters. She is an employee at thesalonand the one who runs the color lab. Rox is the hair colorist at Sunny's salon. She runs the Color Lab, a room on the top floor of the salon that contains all kinds of hair dyes. Rox's favorite item to use at the salon is her hair-coloring flat iron that leaves a rainbow trail when she carries it. Rox is level-headed, fun-loving and smart. She is the most athletic employee at the salon. Rox is a good skateboarder and sometimes does cartwheels while moving from place to place. Because she is very knowledgeable, she knows all about the chemistry of hair coloring and prefers making her own color combinations to using premade dyes. Rox is level-headed, fun-loving and smart. She is the most athletic employee at the salon. Rox is a good skateboarder and sometimes does cartwheels while moving from place to place. Because she is very knowledgeable, she knows all about the chemistry of hair coloring and prefers making her own color combinations to using premade dyes.
